Godot Core Plugin
Last verified: 2026-04-10

Primary sources:
- OpenAI Codex plugins build docs: https://developers.openai.com/codex/plugins/build
- OpenAI Codex customization / skills: https://developers.openai.com/codex/concepts/customization/#skills
- OpenAI Codex MCP guidance: https://developers.openai.com/codex/concepts/customization/#mcp
- OpenAI Codex skills best practices: https://developers.openai.com/codex/skills/#best-practices
- Godot stable docs root: https://docs.godotengine.org/en/stable/
- Godot stable download archive: https://godotengine.org/download/archive/
- Godot official demo projects: https://github.com/godotengine/godot-demo-projects

Identity
- Plugin name: godot-core
- Plugin version: 0.2.0
- Default engine baseline: Godot 4.6.1-stable
- Scope: reusable Codex workflows for Godot engineering, export, Web delivery, Web CJK troubleshooting, and WeChat/Douyin mini-game adaptation

Source policy
- Use OpenAI official Codex docs for plugin packaging, skill design, and evaluation shape.
- Use Godot stable docs and class reference for engine and export facts.
- Use Godot official tutorials and demo projects for pattern examples.
- Use Pixi llms pages only as document-structure inspiration.
- Treat local godot-* skills as heuristics until revalidated.

Plugin skills
- godot-bug-triage: diagnose errors and propose the smallest defensible fix
- godot-feature-impl: implement ordinary Godot gameplay, UI, or systems changes
- godot-scene-refactor: explicit-only scene tree and reference refactors
- godot-export-release: explicit-only preset-driven export and release work
- godot-core: umbrella Godot workflow and compatibility router
- godot-web-export: Web export, deployment, and browser-runtime specialist
- godot-web-cjk-font-fix: Web CJK font-rendering specialist
- godot-minigame-solution: shared WeChat/Douyin mini-game router, installer, and monitor
- godot-wechat-minigame: WeChat mini-game export and runtime specialist
- godot-douyin-minigame: Douyin mini-game export and runtime specialist

Project adaptation expectations
- Keep project-specific constraints in AGENTS.md and project docs.
- Provide exact import, smoke, test, and export commands when possible.
- Prefer the project's pinned Godot version over the plugin baseline.

Docs map
- llms-medium.txt: workflow defaults and routing detail
- llms-full.txt: fuller context pack
- docs/reference-policy.md: source precedence
- docs/architecture-principles.md: plugin design rules
- docs/pattern-cases.md: official tutorial and demo-derived patterns

Exclusions
- No packaged MCP in v0.1
- No bundled app integrations
- No bundled `godot-mini-game-wechat` project
